name: reset-detector
description: Usage-window reset detector (Trio_Specs §C): the standalone library under the Lookout sensor and the guard harness. Fuses the oauth usage endpoint, statusline JSON, and limit-message parsing into one snapshot; jitter-proof window keys; threshold evaluation (pause vs spend mode); and the pure, deterministic guard decision (sensor freshness, token gate, idle gate, once-per-window resurrection, session-pinned resume command).
